title: OptiCraft
body:
# Meet OptiCraft! 
**OptiCraft** - (short from Optimized Minecraft, duh) is a Fabric modpack that aims to provide you with _better in-game perfomance_ for our beloved cube game.
This mod is made to be used a base to create your own modpack. I provide only stable perfomance mods with maybe a few Quality of Life onces, like zoom. So if you want to add a Voice Chat, some animation, maybe MCC Island features or other stuff, **GO ON, add them**! 

***P.S.*** yeah, there a also a few mods that allow customization of models and stuff. I'm pretty much just replacing grandpa OptiFine

Need some perfomance statistics? **No!** You don't! Trust my word and try it out! Gallery is a very poor representation of what it actually feels like

**Highly** incourage you to modify any and every available setting for your own taste! (mods also have setting)
